summary: Designer fully upgraded to align with Wave 8 mapping engine output. All semantic metadata extracted from Wave 8 and rendered in UI.

new_fields: acordCandidates[] - Full ranked list of ACORD candidates
kvpData - Key/value pair data for KVP fields
structuralDelta - Baseline and change tracking metadata
existing_fields: fieldType - Semantic type (text, date, numeric, checkbox, signature, radio)

checkbox_support.detection: Detects checkbox type from source block
checkbox_support.visual: Checkbox icon at top-right of field, filled when checked

signature_support.detection: Detects signature type from source block
signature_support.visual: Signature icon (✎) at top-right, gold when signed

kvp_support.rendering: Key: Value format with light blue background

field_basics_section: Type selector (text, checkbox, date, numeric, signature, dropdown)

each_candidate_shows: Candidate source (dictionary, heuristic, embeddings, geometry, category, fusion)

enhancements: Extraction Details section showing semantic metadata
Category Mode badge (STRICT/PERMISSIVE with color coding)
Full ACORD candidates list with sources
Candidate source attribution (dictionary, heuristic, embeddings, geometry, category, fusion)
Enhanced candidate card with source and rationale

semantic_field_population: Extracts all ACORD candidates from suggestions[]
Extracts kvpData for key/value pair fields
Populates acordCandidates array with full metadata

integration_flow.mapping: mapFields API called with DI output
integration_flow.field_creation: Field objects created with full semantic metadata
integration_flow.designer_display: Fields rendered with semantic overlays and colors
integration_flow.metadata_visible: Properties panel and binding panel show all Wave 8 data
integration_flow.user_interaction: User can select fields, view candidates, override ACORD labels

validation.frontend_build: PASS - Compiles with only chunk size warnings
validation.field_renderer: PASS - Enhanced with semantic labels and state indicators
validation.bindings_panel: PASS - Shows category mode, candidates with sources
validation.pdf_import: PASS - Populates all semantic fields from Wave 8 response
